title: Smoky Gooey Croatian Shrimp Fritters
description: Floral, smoky fritters packed with shrimp, orange zest, and gooey cheese for a high‑protein weeknight treat.

ingredients.name: large shrimp, peeled and deveined
ingredients.notes: pre‑cooked in batter, no additional cooking needed

instructions: Rinse the shrimp, pat them dry, and set aside.
In a medium bowl, whisk together the egg, milk, orange juice, salt, and pepper.
Add the flour, cornmeal, Parmesan, mozzarella, orange zest, and smoked paprika to the wet mixture and stir until a loose batter forms.
Fold the shrimp into the batter, ensuring each piece is coated.
Heat a large skillet over medium‑high heat and add the olive oil and butter; swirl to coat the pan.
When the butter is foamy and the oil shimmers, spoon 2‑3 tablespoonfuls of batter onto the pan, spreading slightly to form small fritters.
Cook each fritter for 3–4 minutes per side, or until golden‑brown and the shrimp are opaque.
Transfer the cooked fritters to a paper‑towel‑lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve hot with a squeeze of fresh lemon juice and a sprinkle of extra smoked paprika if desired.
